name: Gregory Hutchinson
abstract: Gregory Hutchinson (born June 16, 1970) is an American jazz drummer.

about_quotes.speaker: Eddie Marshall
about_quotes.evidence: I don’t know if you know some of these guys like Billy Kilson and Billy Drummond and Gregory Hutchinson, these are these young kids that are demon drummers.
about_quotes.doc_title: Eddie Marshall interviewed by Monk Rowe, San Francisco, California, August 8, 2002

about_quotes.speaker: Roy McCurdy
about_quotes.evidence: I love Gregory Hutchinson; Herlin Riley; all those guys, they play so good.
about_quotes.doc_title: Roy McCurdy interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, November 16, 1995

about_quotes.speaker: Mike Wofford
about_quotes.evidence: I had a drummer named Greg Hutchinson, whose a marvelous young drummer.
about_quotes.doc_title: Mike Wofford interviewed by Monk Rowe, San Diego, California, February 13, 1998
